title: Marie-Octobre
writer: Julien Duvivier, Jacques Robert, Henri Jeanson
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Bernard Blier, Robert Dalban
plot: Fifteen years after WWII, a group of ex-resistance fighters are brought together by Marie-Octobre, so that the former members of the network can finally relive one fateful night and find out who betrayed their murdered leader, Cas...
